name: Parloa

when_to_use: Deploying enterprise-grade AI voice agents for call centers
Automating customer service calls with conversational AI
Integrating AI voice agents with telephony and CRM systems

pros: Enterprise contact-center voice AI out of box
cons: Heavy setup vs DIY on Deepgram or Vapi
review.verdict: Pragmatic if you run a large call center, but startups get more flexibility from Vapi, Retell, or Deepgram stacks.
review.best_for: Enterprise contact centers replacing legacy IVR systems
review.not_for: Startups building voice agents on a flexible stack
